title: Fly Me to the Moon
why_this_song: Fly Me to the Moon by Frank Sinatra (1964) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "other" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "other" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "words" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "words" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You fill my heart with song

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Fly Me to the Moon" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Fly Me to the Moon" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Fly Me to the Moon" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Fly Me to the Moon" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Fly Me to the Moon" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Fly Me to the Moon"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.
